data.title: Binance participates in a joint operation with the UK's NCA to combat crypto licensing phishing scams.
data.description: Binance announced its participation in "Operation Atlantic," an international law enforcement operation led by the UK's National Crime Agency (NCA), joining forces with law enforcement agencies in multiple countries to combat crypto and investment scams, with a focus on "approval phishing" scams. This operation, jointly launched by the NCA, the US Secret Service, and relevant law enforcement and regulatory bodies in Ontario, Canada, aims to identify victims who have already been harmed or are at risk. Approval phishing typically involves posing as investment opportunities to trick users into granting access to their wallets, thereby transferring assets. During the operation, Binance's special investigation team provided on-site support in London, including fraud identification processes, risk screening, and intelligence analysis, and assisted in identifying potential victims and related malicious websites. Binance also provided law enforcement agencies with addresses and suspect intelligence to support asset tracking and countermeasures. The NCA stated that this operation has successfully protected thousands of potential victims in the UK and overseas. Binance emphasized that it will continue to cooperate with global law enforcement agencies to strengthen the fight against crypto scams.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Tether Gold Launches on Conflux for Seamless Transfers
data.description: Tether Gold (XAUt) has launched its full-chain deployment version, XAUt0, on the Conflux network. According to Foresight News, this introduction allows for seamless transfers of tokenized gold across supported blockchains. Previously, USDT0 was also launched on Conflux, offering unified dollar liquidity.

data.title: Crypto Investor Huang Licheng Closes HYPE Position, Continues Ethereum Leverage
data.description: Crypto investor Huang Licheng has recently closed his HYPE long position, according to Odaily. He continues to increase his leverage on Ethereum, holding 12,300 ETH with a position value of $26.611 million and a liquidation price of $2,081.

data.title: IMF Chief: Global Economic Growth Forecast Lowered Due to Iran War
data.description: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva stated that the IMF has lowered its global economic growth forecast due to the war in Iran. Given the spillover effects of the war, the IMF expects short-term support needs to rise to between $20 billion and $50 billion. The war's impact has led to increased short-term inflation expectations, but long-term expectations remain unchanged. Even in the most optimistic scenario, growth forecasts have been revised downwards due to infrastructure damage, supply disruptions, and loss of confidence. (Jinshi)

data.title: Wyoming's Digital Asset Regulation Discussed in Senate Roundtable
data.description:
U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis, chair of the Senate Digital Assets Banking Subcommittee, hosted a roundtable at the Wyoming State Capitol. According to Foresight News, the event included discussions with Comptroller Jonathan V. Gould and Governor Mark Gordon on the state's current digital asset regulatory landscape, the significance of a dual banking system, and how banking regulation can support responsible financial innovation.

Lummis emphasized Wyoming's leadership in the digital asset sector, noting that efforts initiated nearly a decade ago in the state have laid the groundwork for current federal initiatives. She highlighted Wyoming's comprehensive digital asset regulatory framework and expressed the importance of Comptroller Gould's visit to ensure federal policies reflect effective practices.

data.title: Germany Engages in Direct Talks with Iran, Merkel Announces
data.description: Germany is reinitiating direct discussions with Iran's leadership in Tehran, according to BlockBeats. On April 9, German Chancellor Merkel stated that Germany is prepared to support a maritime mission in the Strait of Hormuz if authorized. This development marks a significant step in diplomatic relations between the two nations.

data.title: Germany Considers Support for Hormuz Strait Mission Amid Rising Oil Prices
data.description: German Chancellor Merz has indicated that oil prices may rise beyond February levels. According to Odaily, Germany is prepared to support a maritime mission in the Strait of Hormuz if authorized. The country is currently re-engaging in direct dialogue with Iranian leadership in Tehran.

data.title: Ethereum Developer Joe Sharich Announces Congressional Run in Virginia
data.description: Ethereum developer Joe Sharich has declared his candidacy for the U.S. House of Representatives as a Democrat in a suburban Virginia district. According to NS3.AI, Sharich is notable for being the first cryptocurrency developer to seek a congressional seat. His campaign is expected to focus on leveraging his expertise in blockchain technology to address various legislative challenges.

data.title: Gold and silver prices rose across the board, while cryptocurrency volatility fell, with the EVIX dropping 1.93%.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,757.12 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.80%. Silver prices rose to $74.804 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.02%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 44.80, a daily decrease of 0.27%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 65.08, a daily decrease of 1.93%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.03% to 6.83479. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.24% to 158.942. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.97% to 5,868.79 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 0.97% to 10,582.67 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 1.21% to 23,766.12 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 2.95% to $99.69 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 1.74% to $100.99 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Gold Reaches $4,760 per Ounce with 0.86% Daily Increase
data.description: Spot gold prices have risen to $4,760 per ounce, marking a 0.86% increase within the day. According to Jin10, this upward movement reflects ongoing market dynamics influencing precious metals.

data.title: Etherscan Enhances Contract Page with New Features
data.description:
Etherscan has announced a revamp of its contract page, introducing an IDE-style code browser. According to Foresight News, the update includes features such as file tree navigation, multi-file tabs, contract outline jumping, and cross-file keyword search.

The redesign also improves the interaction interface for reading and writing contract pages, aiming to enhance the user experience in reading and operating smart contracts. Users can now switch to full-screen mode and open matching contract codes directly in Blockscan and Ethereum Remix for editing.

data.title: AlphaTON secures $43 million funding agreement to support AI and privacy-preserving computing infrastructure development.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital, the TON treasury firm, announced a strategic financing agreement with Vertical Data totaling approximately $43 million, expected to close in the second quarter of 2026. AlphaTON stated that this financing collaboration will focus on AI hardware deployment, accelerating its "privacy computing" and sovereign AI infrastructure development, and supporting the convergence of AI, digital assets, and confidential computing. Its AI and privacy computing infrastructure will reportedly provide underlying computing power support for applications from partners such as Telegram and Animoca Brands. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Securitize appoints former SEC executive Brett Redfearn as president.
data.description: Asset tokenization platform Securitize announced the appointment of Brett Redfearn as president and a member of its board of directors. Redfearn has extensive experience in regulatory and capital markets, having previously served as an executive at the SEC, JPMorgan Chase, and Coinbase.

data.title: US stocks opened with mixed results for the crypto sector, with Strategy rising 1.01%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.14%, the S&P 500 fell 0.05%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.06%. Cryptocurrency stocks showed mixed performance: Circle fell 1.16%, Coinbase rose 0.66%, Robinhood rose 1%, Bit Digital fell 0.11%, and Strategy rose 1.01%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital Secures $43 Million Strategic Funding for AI Infrastructure
data.description: AlphaTON Capital has announced a strategic financing agreement with Vertical Data, valued at approximately $43 million. According to Foresight News, the deal is expected to be finalized by the second quarter of 2026. The funding will focus on AI hardware deployment, accelerating the development of privacy computing and sovereign AI infrastructure. This initiative aims to support the integration of AI, digital assets, and confidential computing. Additionally, AlphaTON's AI and privacy computing infrastructure will provide foundational computing power for applications related to partners such as Telegram and Animoca Brands.

data.title: Poland's Central Bank Governor: No Need for Rate Hike, Rate Cuts Paused
data.description: Poland's Central Bank Governor, Adam Glapiński, stated that there is no need to raise interest rates, and that the recent cycle of rate cuts has been paused. According to Jin10, Glapiński emphasized that the current economic conditions do not warrant an increase in rates, suggesting a stable monetary policy stance for the foreseeable future. This decision comes amid ongoing assessments of Poland's economic performance and inflation trends.

data.title: Binance Wallet launched gas-free prediction market trading after integrating Predict.fun.
data.description: Binance Wallet has integrated Predict.fun, expanding its on-chain prediction market functionality from the testing phase to a wider scope and providing gas fee subsidies for users' transactions and settlements on the BNB Smart Chain. It is understood that this upgrade requires users to create a dedicated Prediction Account. The system will automatically generate a keyless wallet based on multi-party computation (MPC). Binance states that its wallet does not act as a counterparty in transactions, and the related services are not directly regulated by any specific regulatory body. (The Block)

data.title: Wintermute Launches Yield Dashboard for Institutional Clients
data.description:
Wintermute has announced the launch of a Yield Dashboard on its institutional platform, NODE. According to Foresight News, this tool provides daily reference quotes for options strategies covering over 50 assets, with data sourced directly from Wintermute's OTC options desk.

The dashboard allows users to explore strategies and adjust parameters electronically before requesting quotes, ensuring no information leakage. Wintermute highlights that this tool is particularly beneficial for institutional companies and token project teams holding positions in less liquid tokens.

data.title: Circle's Arc Blockchain Opens Testnet Code Ahead of Mainnet Launch
data.description: Circle's Arc blockchain has announced the release of its testnet code ahead of its mainnet launch. According to Foresight News, developers can now initiate testnet nodes and review the source code. Additionally, a bug bounty program has been launched on the HackerOne platform to enhance security measures.

data.title: Drift: A recovery plan has been developed; the current focus is on stabilizing the situation.
data.description: Drift Protocol, which suffered a $285 million theft of crypto assets, posted an update on the X platform regarding the incident. They stated that they are actively working with partners to develop a coordinated recovery plan, and their current focus is on stabilizing the situation and providing protocol-level protection for all affected users and partners. Furthermore, Drift indicated that many people rely on Drift as their core infrastructure and that they will participate in the Solana Foundation's security project STRIDE; more details will be released later.
